text: When should abandonment of a ship be undertaken?

options.text: As soon as a minor fire starts
As a last resort on orders from the Master
When the ship runs out of fresh water
At any time individual crew members feel like it

explanation: Abandonment is a critical, life-threatening procedure. It must only be done as a last resort, after the Master has evaluated that the ship is no longer safe to stay aboard and has officially given the order.
